overview.description: The iShares Euro High Yield Corporate Bond USD Hedged ETF (EUHY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund tracks a market-value weighted index comprised of Euro-denominated, high-yield corporate bonds from around the world, including emerging markets. Debt securities must have at least one year remaining maturity. EUHY was launched on Apr 3, 2012 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: Bloomberg PanEuropean High Yield Euro Index Hedged
